title: Develop a soil health and plant nutrition program
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Develop a soil health and plant nutrition program demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Determine relevant regional data and site characteristics

pcs.text: Define goals and target site for assessment and development of program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Define goals and target site for assessment and development of program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Define goals and target site for assessment and development of program.

pcs.text: Access and review site and climate data, and environmental context information
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Access and review site and climate data, and environmental context information?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Access and review site and climate data, and environmental context information.

pcs.text: Determine appropriate soil, plant and water tests, according to plant species, climatic conditions and prevailing growth media
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine appropriate soil, plant and water tests, according to plant species, climatic conditions and prevailing growth media?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine appropriate soil, plant and water tests, according to plant species, climatic conditions and prevailing growth media.

pcs.text: Develop a soil, plant and water testing program that defines sampling, field testing, off-site analysis activities, task responsibilities, involvement of contractors, scheduling and desired information outcomes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop a soil, plant and water testing program that defines sampling, field testing, off-site analysis activities, task responsibilities, involvement of contractors, scheduling and desired information outcomes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop a soil, plant and water testing program that defines sampling, field testing, off-site analysis activities, task responsibilities, involvement of contractors, scheduling and desired information outcomes.

pcs.text: Implement and monitor soil, plant and water testing tasks and liaison procedures with outside testing agencies, and take remedial action where necessary
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement and monitor soil, plant and water testing tasks and liaison procedures with outside testing agencies, and take remedial action where necessary?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement and monitor soil, plant and water testing tasks and liaison procedures with outside testing agencies, and take remedial action where necessary.

pcs.text: Compile and present data and readings
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Compile and present data and readings?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Compile and present data and readings.

pcs.text: Determine seasonal variations and requirements from published data on species, historical records and own experience
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine seasonal variations and requirements from published data on species, historical records and own experience?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine seasonal variations and requirements from published data on species, historical records and own experience.

pcs.text: Determine characteristics, condition and nutritional status of soils and plant species by analysing collected data and comparing to accepted standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine characteristics, condition and nutritional status of soils and plant species by analysing collected data and comparing to accepted standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine characteristics, condition and nutritional status of soils and plant species by analysing collected data and comparing to accepted standards.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Determine relevant regional data and site characteristics

elements.title: Define the requirements for a plant nutrition program

pcs.text: Identify nutritional requirements of the plant during the growing cycle and growing conditions, using published data on species, historical records and own experience
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify nutritional requirements of the plant during the growing cycle and growing conditions, using published data on species, historical records and own experience?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify nutritional requirements of the plant during the growing cycle and growing conditions, using published data on species, historical records and own experience.

pcs.text: Develop program to achieve appropriate soil conditions and nutrient availability for plant growth
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop program to achieve appropriate soil conditions and nutrient availability for plant growth?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop program to achieve appropriate soil conditions and nutrient availability for plant growth.

pcs.text: Determine soil amendments, management practices and fertiliser requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine soil amendments, management practices and fertiliser requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine soil amendments, management practices and fertiliser requirements.

pcs.text: Identify and cost resources, tools, equipment and machinery required for program, and confirm availability with suppliers, contractors and appropriate personnel
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and cost resources, tools, equipment and machinery required for program, and confirm availability with suppliers, contractors and appropriate personnel?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and cost resources, tools, equipment and machinery required for program, and confirm availability with suppliers, contractors and appropriate personnel.

pcs.text: Determine cost-effective approach to soil management, soil amendment and provision of plant nutrients
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine cost-effective approach to soil management, soil amendment and provision of plant nutrients?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine cost-effective approach to soil management, soil amendment and provision of plant nutrients.

pcs.text: Identify hazards and assess risks associated with program, and develop and document control measures to manage risks according to workplace health and safety procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify hazards and assess risks associated with program, and develop and document control measures to manage risks according to workplace health and safety procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards and assess risks associated with program, and develop and document control measures to manage risks according to workplace health and safety procedures.

pcs.text: Identify and document environmental implications of program, and implement suitable controls
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and document environmental implications of program, and implement suitable controls?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and document environmental implications of program, and implement suitable controls.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Define the requirements for a plant nutrition program

elements.title: Document the soil health and plant nutrition program and specifications

pcs.text: Establish a detailed soil health and plant nutrition plan, objectives, specifications and associated costs based on program requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Establish a detailed soil health and plant nutrition plan, objectives, specifications and associated costs based on program requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish a detailed soil health and plant nutrition plan, objectives, specifications and associated costs based on program requirements.

pcs.text: Develop and document detailed on-site procedures and scheduled activities required for program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop and document detailed on-site procedures and scheduled activities required for program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop and document detailed on-site procedures and scheduled activities required for program.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Document the soil health and plant nutrition program and specifications

elements.title: Monitor plant growth and evaluate the program

pcs.text: Communicate soil health and plant nutrition plan, procedures and schedule of activities to staff
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Communicate soil health and plant nutrition plan, procedures and schedule of activities to staff?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Communicate soil health and plant nutrition plan, procedures and schedule of activities to staff.

pcs.text: Monitor program implementation and results by testing soil, plants and produce
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor program implementation and results by testing soil, plants and produce?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor program implementation and results by testing soil, plants and produce.

pcs.text: Review and refine program to ensure it is responsive to changing conditions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review and refine program to ensure it is responsive to changing conditions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review and refine program to ensure it is responsive to changing conditions.

pcs.text: Identify non-compliance with documented objectives and specifications, and implement remedial actions to alleviate or overcome identified shortcomings in program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify non-compliance with documented objectives and specifications, and implement remedial actions to alleviate or overcome identified shortcomings in program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify non-compliance with documented objectives and specifications, and implement remedial actions to alleviate or overcome identified shortcomings in program.

pcs.text: Identify and document remediation action to improve plant nutrition in consultation with management
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and document remediation action to improve plant nutrition in consultation with management?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and document remediation action to improve plant nutrition in consultation with management.

pcs.text: Identify and record variances from plan and scheduled activities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and record variances from plan and scheduled activities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and record variances from plan and scheduled activities.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Monitor plant growth and evaluate the program
